author: mroguljic
body:
#### PR description:
This PR adds an era modifier that uses an existing process modifier (https://github.com/cms-sw/cmssw/pull/50245) to replace pixel template CPE algorithm with the generic algorithm in reconstruction of cluster positions. The PR is created in case of a possible change in reconstruction during 2026 data-taking.

#### PR validation:

No changes in worfklows are expected. Tested with the following change in `Era_Run3_2026_cff.py`. If requested, this can be included as part of the PR so that it only gets merged if / when it is decided to make the switch.

```
# Change in Era_Run3_2026_cff.py **not part of PR**

import FWCore.ParameterSet.Config as cms

from Configuration.Eras.Era_Run3_2025_cff import Run3_2025
from Configuration.Eras.Modifier_run3_SiPixelGenericCPE_cff import run3_SiPixelGenericCPE

Run3_2026 = cms.ModifierChain(Run3_2025, run3_SiPixelGenericCPE)
```

Test configuration

```
cmsDriver.py step3 --era Run3_2026 --conditions auto:run3_data --data -s RECO --no_exec -n 1 --python_filename test_Run3_SiPixelGenericCPE_2026.py
edmConfigDump test_Run3_SiPixelGenericCPE_2026.py >& dump.txt
```

As expected, only two ESProducers contain `WithAngleAndTemplate` (i.e. producers for template reconstruction)

```
grep WithAngleAndTemplate dump.txt -A 3 -B 3


process.TTRHBuilderAngleAndTemplate = cms.ESProducer("TkTransientTrackingRecHitBuilderESProducer",
    ComponentName = cms.string('WithAngleAndTemplate'),
    ComputeCoarseLocalPositionFromDisk = cms.bool(False),
    Matcher = cms.string('StandardMatcher'),
    Phase2StripCPE = cms.string(''),
--


process.TTRHBuilderAngleAndTemplateWithoutProbQ = cms.ESProducer("TkTransientTrackingRecHitBuilderESProducer",
    ComponentName = cms.string('WithAngleAndTemplateWithoutProbQ'),
    ComputeCoarseLocalPositionFromDisk = cms.bool(False),
    Matcher = cms.string('StandardMatcher'),
    Phase2StripCPE = cms.string(''),
```

But they are not used anywhere

```
grep TTRHBuilderAngleAndTemplate dump.txt 
process.TTRHBuilderAngleAndTemplate = cms.ESProducer("TkTransientTrackingRecHitBuilderESProducer",
process.TTRHBuilderAngleAndTemplateWithoutProbQ = cms.ESProducer("TkTransientTrackingRecHitBuilderESProducer",
```

#### If this PR is a backport please specify the original PR and why you need to backport that PR. If this PR will be backported please specify to which release cycle the backport is meant for:

To be backported to 16.0.X
title: Pixel CPE Generic-only era modifier
